title: Open the 'Featured' section of Champions League coverage
test_steps: Open the Eurosport app. | Tap on the 'Featured' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is displayed.

title: Navigate to the 'Results' section
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the 'Results' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'Results' section of the Champions League coverage is displayed.

title: Navigate to the 'Videos' section
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the 'Videos' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'Videos' section of the Champions League coverage is displayed.

title: Navigate to the 'Latest' section
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the 'Latest' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'Latest' section of the Champions League coverage is displayed.

title: Click on the large image of a person holding a card labeled 'FC Bayern München (GER)'
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the large image of a person holding a card labeled 'FC Bayern München (GER).'
expected_result: A detailed page about FC Bayern München (GER) is displayed.

title: Click on the headline 'Arsenal drawn against Bayern Munich in last 16'
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the headline 'Arsenal drawn against Bayern Munich in last 16'.
expected_result: A detailed article about the Champions League draw is displayed.

title: Click on the first smaller image with the caption 'Champions League predictions: City to crash out, Arsenal thro...'
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the first smaller image with the caption 'Champions League predictions: City to crash out, Arsenal thro...'.
expected_result: A detailed article about Champions League predictions is displayed.

title: Click on the second smaller image with the caption 'Best Tweets: It's happened again...Arsenal draw Bayern'
preconditions: The 'Featured' section of the Champions League coverage is open.
test_steps: Tap on the second smaller image with the caption 'Best Tweets: It's happened again...Arsenal draw Bayern'.
expected_result: A detailed article about best tweets related to the Champions League draw is displayed.
